mapper.sql: id, nickname, submate_email, phone_number, pin_hash, role, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( role, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{role}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM users WHERE nickname = #{nickname} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM users WHERE phone_number = #{phoneNumber} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM users WHERE submate_email = #{submateEmail} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, submate_email = #{submateEmail}, phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, pin_hash = #{pinHash}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, submate_email = #{submateEmail}, phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, pin_hash = #{pinHash}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
